home.title: Your best smile starts here
home.subtitle: We provide excellent dental care with state-of-the-art technology and a team of specialists committed to your oral health.
home.featured_services_subtitle: High-quality dental treatments for the whole family

services.hero_subtitle: We offer comprehensive dental treatments with cutting-edge technology and highly trained professionals.

orthodontics.name: Orthodontics
orthodontics.description: Dental alignment with metal, ceramic brackets or invisible aligners. Restore the functionality and aesthetics of your smile with personalized treatments for adults and children.

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.description: Replace missing teeth with high-durability titanium implants. The most aesthetic and functional solution that integrates perfectly with your bone structure.

cleaning.name: Cleaning & Prophylaxis
cleaning.description: Professional removal of tartar, bacterial plaque and stains. Essential treatment to prevent cavities and periodontal diseases, with visible results from the first session.

whitening.name: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Restore the natural brightness of your teeth with our professional whitening system. Safe, immediate and long-lasting results supervised by specialists.

pediatric.name: Pediatric Dentistry
pediatric.description: Specialized dental care for children in a friendly, stress-free environment. We prevent cavities, guide dental development and build healthy habits from an early age.

emergency.name: 24h Emergencies
emergency.description: Immediate attention for acute pain, dental trauma and other dental emergencies. We are available 24 hours a day for when you need us most.

about.hero_subtitle: Over a decade committed to the oral health of Lima.
about.doctor_bio: Dr. Daniel Tello is a dental surgeon with over 10 years of experience in modern dentistry. A honors graduate from Universidad Cayetano Heredia, he completed specialization studies in implantology and oral rehabilitation in Spain and Brazil. His approach combines clinical precision with a close, human touch, always prioritizing patient well-being. Under his leadership, Dental Tello Clinic has established itself as a reference of excellence in Lima, serving over five thousand patients with results that speak for themselves.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We build lasting relationships with our patients based on transparency, respect and honest communication at every stage of treatment.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: We constantly invest in state-of-the-art equipment to offer precise diagnoses and less invasive treatments with better results.

warmth.title: Warmth
warmth.description: We understand that visiting the dentist can cause anxiety. That's why we create a welcoming environment where every patient feels safe and well cared for.

blog.hero_subtitle: Tips, news and education to care for your oral health.

post1.title: How often should I visit the dentist?
post1.excerpt: Most people underestimate the importance of preventive visits. Discover why the right frequency can save you time, money and discomfort.

post2.title: Everything about dental implants
post2.excerpt: Dental implants represent the most advanced solution for replacing lost teeth. We explain the process, duration, care and why the investment is worth it.

post3.title: How stress affects your oral health
post3.excerpt: Bruxism, ulcers and periodontal disease have a direct link to chronic stress. Learn the warning signs and how to protect your mouth.
